name: @ivanli-cn/blog
description: Ivan's Blog - A hybrid Astro public site, admin SPA, and legacy Next runtime

scripts.dev: bun scripts/generate-version.ts && concurrently --names "WebDAV,LegacyNext,Astro,Admin,Gateway" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow,blue,green" "bun run webdav:dev" "bun run dev:next:internal" "bun run site:dev" "bun run admin:dev" "bun run gateway:dev"
scripts.build: bun run prebuild && bun --bun next build && bun run site:build && bun run admin:build
scripts.dev-db:reset: DB_PATH=./dev-data/sqlite.db bun run drop-db --force && DB_PATH=./dev-data/sqlite.db bun run migrate && DB_PATH=./dev-data/sqlite.db bun run seed
scripts.test-db:reset: DB_PATH=./test-data/sqlite.db bun run drop-db --force && DB_PATH=./test-data/sqlite.db bun run migrate && DB_PATH=./test-data/sqlite.db bun run seed
scripts.test-env:clean: DB_PATH=./test-data/sqlite.db bun run seed:clear && bun run test-data:clean
scripts.test-env:reset: DB_PATH=${DB_PATH:-./test-data/sqlite.db} LOCAL_CONTENT_BASE_PATH=${LOCAL_CONTENT_BASE_PATH:-./test-data/local} WEBDAV_URL=${WEBDAV_URL:-http://localhost:25091} bun run test-env:clean && DB_PATH=${DB_PATH:-./test-data/sqlite.db} LOCAL_CONTENT_BASE_PATH=${LOCAL_CONTENT_BASE_PATH:-./test-data/local} WEBDAV_URL=${WEBDAV_URL:-http://localhost:25091} bun run migrate && DB_PATH=${DB_PATH:-./test-data/sqlite.db} LOCAL_CONTENT_BASE_PATH=${LOCAL_CONTENT_BASE_PATH:-./test-data/local} WEBDAV_URL=${WEBDAV_URL:-http://localhost:25091} bun run seed && bun run test-data:generate && DB_PATH=${DB_PATH:-./test-data/sqlite.db} LOCAL_CONTENT_BASE_PATH=${LOCAL_CONTENT_BASE_PATH:-./test-data/local} WEBDAV_URL=${WEBDAV_URL:-http://localhost:25091} bun run test-sync:trigger && bun scripts/generate-version.ts
scripts.test-env:reset-fs-only: DB_PATH=${DB_PATH:-./test-data/sqlite.db} LOCAL_CONTENT_BASE_PATH=${LOCAL_CONTENT_BASE_PATH:-./test-data/local} CONTENT_SOURCES=local bun run test-env:clean && DB_PATH=${DB_PATH:-./test-data/sqlite.db} LOCAL_CONTENT_BASE_PATH=${LOCAL_CONTENT_BASE_PATH:-./test-data/local} CONTENT_SOURCES=local bun run migrate && DB_PATH=${DB_PATH:-./test-data/sqlite.db} LOCAL_CONTENT_BASE_PATH=${LOCAL_CONTENT_BASE_PATH:-./test-data/local} CONTENT_SOURCES=local bun run seed && bun run test-data:generate && DB_PATH=${DB_PATH:-./test-data/sqlite.db} LOCAL_CONTENT_BASE_PATH=${LOCAL_CONTENT_BASE_PATH:-./test-data/local} CONTENT_SOURCES=local bun run test-sync:trigger && bun scripts/generate-version.ts
scripts.test-server:start: bun run test-env:reset && concurrently --names "WebDAV,LegacyNext,Astro,Admin,Gateway" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow,blue,green" "dufs test-data/webdav --port 25091 --allow-all --enable-cors" "NODE_ENV=test ADMIN_EMAIL=admin-test@test.local DB_PATH=./test-data/sqlite.db LOCAL_CONTENT_BASE_PATH=./test-data/local WEBDAV_URL=http://127.0.0.1:25091 NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:25090 PUBLIC_SITE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:25090 INTERNAL_NEXT_PORT=25092 bun run dev:next:internal" "DB_PATH=./test-data/sqlite.db LOCAL_CONTENT_BASE_PATH=./test-data/local WEBDAV_URL=http://127.0.0.1:25091 NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:25090 PUBLIC_SITE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:25090 SITE_PORT=25093 bun run site:dev" "ADMIN_PORT=25094 bun run admin:dev" "NODE_ENV=test ADMIN_EMAIL=admin-test@test.local DB_PATH=./test-data/sqlite.db LOCAL_CONTENT_BASE_PATH=./test-data/local WEBDAV_URL=http://127.0.0.1:25091 NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:25090 PUBLIC_SITE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:25090 PORT=25090 INTERNAL_NEXT_PORT=25092 SITE_PORT=25093 ADMIN_PORT=25094 bun run gateway:dev"
scripts.test: bun test src tests/integration tests/lib tests/server --exclude='tests/e2e/**/*'
scripts.dev:next:internal: sh -c 'PORT=${INTERNAL_NEXT_PORT:-25092}; export PORT; bun --bun next dev --turbopack --port ${PORT}'
scripts.site:dev: sh -c 'bun run public:export && bunx astro dev --host 127.0.0.1 --port ${SITE_PORT:-25093}'
scripts.site:build: bun run public:export && bunx astro build
scripts.admin:build: bun run prebuild && bunx vite build --config apps/admin/vite.config.ts --configLoader runner
